# Sample text with reference-style image links

A reference-style image link: ![picture][0].

Another one: ![alt text][1].

And with file protocol: ![another][2].

Another: ![another][alt text].

Collapsed form: ![alt text][].

Shortcut form: ![0].

With non-existent reference: ![missing][3].

Reference definitions:
[0]: ./balloons.jpg
[1]: /home/user/cloud/wiki/balloons.jpg
[2]: file:///home/user/cloud/wiki/balloons.jpg

[alt text]: ./image.png
